location.description: Placement of the menu relative to the activator; -end aligns the right edges.

openOnHover.description: Open while the pointer is over the activator or content.

closeOnContentClick.description: Close the menu when its content is clicked.

offset.description: Gap in px between the activator and the menu.

contentClass.description: Class(es) applied to the teleported content element.

update:modelValue.description: Emitted when the open state changes.

activator.description: The trigger. Receives { props, isActive } — spread props onto your element.

default.description: Menu content. Receives { close } to dismiss programmatically.
